title: Input buffer circuit, intelligent optimization method, and semiconductor memory thereof
abstract: An input buffer circuit, an intelligent optimization method, and a semiconductor memory thereof are provided. The input buffer circuit may include a detection circuit (110), a mode control circuit (120), a double-end differential circuit (130), and a single-end complementary metal oxide semiconductor (CMOS) unit (140). The detection circuit (110) may be configured to obtain a working frequency of a chip. The mode control circuit (120) is connected to the detection circuit (110), and configured to control, according to the working frequency obtained by the detection circuit (110), an input buffer to enter a double-end differential input mode and a single-end CMOS input mode. The double-end differential circuit (130) and the single-end CMOS circuit (140) are connected to the mode control circuit (120). The double-end differential input circuit (130) may be configured to process high-speed data transmission in the double-end differential input mode. The single-end CMOS circuit (140) may be configured to a process low-speed data transmission in the single-end CMOS input mode.
